title: Idealized sort contract (authored for the sorting-behavior task)
description: One collection exposes a sort query parameter selecting a sortable field and an order query parameter (asc|desc). The task seeds 20 records with distinct non-sequential names and created_at timestamps two seconds apart, then verifies ascending/descending ordering on name and created_at plus 400 handling for an invalid sort field and an invalid order direction. Exercised against an isolated in-process reference resource; DummyJSON is never seeded or modified.
